title: Add temperature converter utility
description: Create a temperature converter utility in src/utils/temperature.ts that converts between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin. Add co-located tests in temperature.test.ts following the existing utility patterns (e.g., clamp.ts).

existing_patterns.pattern: Single-function utility module with typed inputs/outputs, basic validation via Error throwing
Co-located vitest test file with describe/it blocks using import from parent module
